top_signals.title: Dubai Holding Weighs Buying Data Center Stake
top_signals.summary: Dubai Holding is exploring an investment in private equity-backed data center builder Hscale, Alex Dooler reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ‘All the Lovers in the Night’ film adaptation brings ‘unstable beauty’ to the screen
top_signals.summary: During the Cannes Film Festival, director Yukiko Sode and actors Yukino Kishii and Tadanobu Asano reflected on the process of bringing Mieko Kawakami's novel to life.
